$comment: Overlay file to enrich auto-generated OpenAPI spec with better descriptions, examples, and response details. Keyed by 'METHOD /path'. Only fields present here will be merged — everything else stays as-is from the generated spec.

System.description: Health checks and system status endpoints.

Auth.description: Authentication and session management. All auth endpoints use Firebase for identity verification.

Admins.description: Manage admin users — update profiles, emails, and permissions.

Agents.description: Agent operations — search agents, retrieve opportunities, and manage agent-related data.

Contacts.description: Create, search, and manage contacts associated with deals and opportunities.

Contractors.description: Contractor management — profiles, assignments, dashboards, and contractor-related operations.

Estimates.description: Create, update, duplicate, and manage renovation estimates and change orders.

Opportunities.description: Deal opportunities — create, update, associate contacts, and manage onsite visits.

Property.description: Property data — lookups, valuations, images, and property-related analytics.

Homes.description: Home records — create, retrieve, and manage home details and associated data.

Vision Ai.description: AI-powered property analysis — condition reports, photo analysis, neighborhood reports, and renovation recommendations.

Analyze.description: Property analysis tools — comparables, condition assessment, photo analysis, and report generation.

Rma.description: Renovation Management Agreements — create, manage, and track RMA contracts and related documents.

Contracts.description: Document contracts — creation, signing sessions, status tracking, and PandaDoc integration.

Payments.description: Payment processing — checkout sessions, subscriptions, payment intents, and Stripe webhook handling.

Users.description: User management — create, retrieve, update, and delete platform users.

Calendars.description: Calendar management — scheduling, availability, and calendar configuration for meetings and onsite visits.

Webhooks.description: Inbound webhook handlers for HubSpot, PandaDoc, affiliate partners, and other third-party integrations.

Media.description: File and media management — upload, retrieve, and manage photos and documents.

Referrals.description: Referral tracking — create and manage referral records and attribution.

Ret Catalog.description: Renovation product catalog — browse product types, options, and selections for estimates.

Marketing Center.description: Marketing tools — flyers, campaigns, and marketing material management.

Onsite Visits.description: Onsite visit scheduling, management, and tracking for property inspections.

Project Scopes.description: Project scope management — line items, scope changes, and renovation project tracking.

Broadcast.description: Broadcast messaging — send communications to groups of users.

WeeklyUpdates.description: Weekly renovation progress updates — create, view, and manage update reports.

Utility.description: Utility endpoints — home image lookups, image deduplication, and market health checks.

Predictions.description: AI image generation — create and poll prediction jobs for material and design visualizations.

Reimagine.description: AI-powered home reimagining — generate design visualizations and renovation previews.

GET /health.description: Returns the current health status of the API. No authentication required. Use this to verify API connectivity.

POST /v1/auth/login.description: Authenticates a user with Firebase credentials and returns session information. This is the primary entry point for all authenticated API access.

PATCH /v1/admins/email/{uid}.description: Updates the email address for an admin user identified by their Firebase UID.

parameters.uid: Firebase UID of the admin user.

PATCH /v1/admins/{uid}.description: Updates profile fields (email, last name, phone, position) for an admin user.

parameters.uid: Firebase UID of the admin user.

POST /v1/agents/search.description: Search for agents by name, email, or other criteria. Returns a paginated list of matching agent records.

POST /v1/agents/get-opportunities.description: Retrieves deal opportunities associated with a specific agent. Supports filtering by deal type, date range, and status.

parameters.agentId: The unique identifier for the agent.
parameters.after: Cursor for pagination — pass the last opportunity ID from the previous page.
parameters.isLost: When true, only return lost/closed opportunities.
parameters.startDate: Unix timestamp — only return opportunities created on or after this date.

POST /v1/contacts/search.description: Search for contacts across the platform by name, email, phone, or other fields.

POST /v1/contacts/.description: Creates a new contact record in the system. Contacts can be associated with deals and opportunities.

POST /v1/estimates/.description: Creates a new renovation estimate for a property. The estimate includes line items from the product catalog, pricing, and scope details.

GET /v1/estimates/{estimateId}.description: Retrieves a single estimate by ID, including all line items, pricing, and status information.

parameters.estimateId: The unique identifier for the estimate.

PATCH /v1/estimates/{estimateId}.description: Updates an existing estimate. Can modify line items, pricing, status, and other estimate fields.

parameters.estimateId: The unique identifier for the estimate.

POST /v2/deals/.description: Creates a new deal in the pipeline. Deals are routed to the appropriate pipeline and stage based on property value and deal type.

GET /v2/opportunities/.description: Returns a list of all opportunities. Supports pagination and filtering.

GET /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}.description: Retrieves a single opportunity by ID, including associated contacts, property data, and status.

parameters.opportunityId: The unique identifier for the opportunity.

PATCH /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}.description: Updates fields on an existing opportunity.

parameters.opportunityId: The unique identifier for the opportunity.

POST /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/a.description: Links an existing contact to an opportunity.

parameters.opportunityId: The unique identifier for the opportunity.

POST /v2/users/.description: Creates a new platform user with the specified profile information.

GET /v2/users/{uid}.description: Retrieves a user profile by Firebase UID.

PATCH /v2/users/{uid}.description: Updates profile fields for an existing user.

DELETE /v2/users/{uid}.description: Soft-deletes a user by Firebase UID. The user record is marked as deleted but retained for audit purposes.

POST /v1/rma/.description: Creates a new Renovation Management Agreement for a property. Triggers notification workflows and sets up the contract pipeline.

GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}.description: Retrieves an RMA by ID, including contract status, activity logs, and associated notes.

parameters.rmaId: The unique identifier for the RMA.

POST /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract/send.description: Sends the RMA contract to all recipients for e-signature via PandaDoc.

parameters.rmaId: The unique identifier for the RMA.

POST /v2/payments/reno/create-checkout-s.description: Creates a Stripe checkout session for renovation-related payments. Returns a session URL to redirect the user to Stripe's hosted checkout.

POST /v1/utility/check-home-images.description: Multi-source home image lookup by address. Queries AnyProp, Zillow, RestB, and other providers, then deduplicates results.

POST /v2/analyze/condition.description: Submits property photos for AI-powered condition analysis. Returns a structured assessment of property condition, identified features, and renovation recommendations.

POST /v2/analyze/comparables.description: Retrieves comparable property data for valuation analysis.

POST /v2/analyze/create-report.description: Generates a full property analysis report combining condition assessment, comparables, and renovation recommendations.

POST /v1/support/.description: Submits a new support ticket with contact information and issue details.

GET /v2/calendars/.description: Returns all configured calendars for scheduling meetings and onsite visits.

POST /v2/calendars/.description: Creates a new calendar configuration for scheduling.

POST /v1/predictions/.description: Starts an async AI image generation job. Returns a job ID that can be polled for completion. Supports material predictions with reference images.

GET /v1/predictions/{id}.description: Polls the status of an AI prediction job. Returns the generated images when the job is complete.

parameters.id: The prediction job ID returned from the create endpoint.
